case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JACQUELINE QUINTANA et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTANA, JACQUELINE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT QUINTANA, JACQUELINE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR AUG-25-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 514
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-29-2011 VACATED - CASE SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON 08-25-11 IN DEPT. 514.
